overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's futuristic downtown at night. The scene features neon-lit stairways, open plazas with holographic koi fish advertisements, and elevated walkways surrounded by towering skyscrapers with vibrant signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stairway with cyan neon accent lighting

events.description: ascending final steps and approaching exit from covered stairway to open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking up wide concrete stairs illuminated by embedded blue neon strips, following another pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking up the stairs ahead of the player character

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with embedded cyan blue neon light strips along the edges
massive curved concrete overpass or bridge structure covering the stairway
tropical palm trees visible at the top of the stairway exit

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide concrete stairway bathed in cyan neon light, moving under a massive concrete overpass structure. The environment is sheltered and artificially lit, with palm trees visible at the distant exit and skyscrapers looming in the background fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with holographic fish advertisements

events.description: exiting covered stairway into open night air with full visibility of the night sky and city lights
turning left to view a large orange holographic koi fish swimming between the skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza while observing the massive holographic koi fish swimming overhead and between buildings

entered.detail: massive glowing blue holographic koi fish swimming through the air above the plaza
open paved pedestrian area with decorative planters and scattered palm trees
large glowing orange holographic koi fish with flowing fins swimming near the building facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered stairway into an open plaza, the scene reveals a breathtaking view of Night City's skyline dominated by massive holographic koi fish swimming through the air. The character walks across the paved plaza surrounded by palm trees, then turns to observe an orange holographic fish before continuing toward the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street corridor with towering neon-lit skyscraper

events.description: transitioning from open plaza to street level corridor between massive skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking along wet pavement toward a massive skyscraper illuminated with prominent vertical yellow neon strips

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking in the same direction along the street

entered.detail: massive skyscraper facade dominated by prominent vertical yellow neon light strips and red signage at the top
tall vertical digital advertisement screens mounted on the building facades

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city street corridor flanked by towering skyscrapers, with a particularly massive building featuring vertical yellow neon lighting dominating the view ahead. Digital billboards line the street while sparse pedestrians walk along the pavement, and the holographic fish from the plaza are no longer visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with integrated neon lighting through urban canyon

events.description: beginning ascent of stairs leading to elevated walkway
transitioning from under the overpass to the open elevated walkway with blue neon edge lighting
holographic koi fish reappear swimming between the skyscrapers alongside the elevated path

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to an elevated walkway then proceeding along the neon-lit path through a dense canyon of skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the elevated walkway moving away from the camera

entered.detail: raised pedestrian path with glowing blue neon strips embedded along the edges and geometric floor patterns
large sweeping concrete overpass structure arching over and alongside the walkway
blue holographic fish swimming between the buildings alongside the elevated path

segments.scene_description: The character ascends to an elevated walkway bathed in cyan neon light, passing under a massive curved overpass. The walkway cuts through a dense urban canyon of skyscrapers, with holographic koi fish reappearing to swim gracefully between the towering buildings. The path continues forward with other pedestrians visible ahead, surrounded by the glowing blue edge lighting and geometric floor patterns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered neon stairway into the expansive, holographic heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins with the character ascending a wide concrete stairway bathed in cyan light under a massive overpass, moving toward a distant, foggy skyline. As the character emerges from the cover, the scene opens into a vast plaza where the environment transforms into a breathtaking display of massive holographic koi fish swimming through the air amidst scattered palm trees. The camera then shifts toward a wet city street corridor flanked by towering skyscrapers and vertical yellow neon lighting, before finally ascending to an elevated walkway. This final transition leads the character back into a dense urban canyon of glowing blue edge lighting and geometric patterns, where the holographic fish reappear to swim gracefully between the skyscrapers.
